news.admin¶

admin.py - Django admin configuration for the News application. Registers all models with sensible list displays and filters.

class news.admin.ArticleAdmin(model, admin_site)[source]¶

Bases: ModelAdmin

actions = ['approve_articles']¶
approve_articles(request, queryset)[source]¶

Bulk-approve selected articles from the admin interface.

list_display = ('title', 'author', 'publisher', 'approved', 'created_at')¶
list_filter = ('approved', 'publisher', 'created_at')¶
property media¶
ordering = ('-created_at',)¶
search_fields = ('title', 'author__username', 'content')¶
class news.admin.CustomUserAdmin(model, admin_site)[source]¶

Bases: UserAdmin

add_fieldsets = ((None, {'classes': ('wide',), 'fields': ('username', 'usable_password', 'password1', 'password2')}), ('News App', {'fields': ('role', 'publisher')}))¶
fieldsets = ((None, {'fields': ('username', 'password')}), ('Personal info', {'fields': ('first_name', 'last_name', 'email')}), ('Permissions', {'fields': ('is_active', 'is_staff', 'is_superuser', 'groups', 'user_permissions')}), ('Important dates', {'fields': ('last_login', 'date_joined')}), ('News App', {'fields': ('role', 'publisher', 'subscribed_publishers', 'subscribed_journalists')}))¶
list_display = ('username', 'email', 'role', 'publisher', 'is_active')¶
list_filter = ('role', 'publisher', 'is_active')¶
property media¶
ordering = ('username',)¶
search_fields = ('username', 'email', 'first_name', 'last_name')¶
class news.admin.NewsletterAdmin(model, admin_site)[source]¶

Bases: ModelAdmin

filter_horizontal = ('articles',)¶
list_display = ('title', 'author', 'created_at')¶
property media¶
ordering = ('-created_at',)¶
search_fields = ('title', 'author__username')¶
class news.admin.PublisherAdmin(model, admin_site)[source]¶

Bases: ModelAdmin

list_display = ('name', 'website', 'created_at')¶
property media¶
ordering = ('name',)¶
search_fields = ('name',)¶
